meta.title: Evaluating Vendor AI Claims
meta.description:
How do you, the customer, evaluate the benefits of a products' AI claims and capabilties? How do know if their AI approach is a dead end or the start of something that will show great improvement in the next 1 - 3 years?

In 2024/2025 almost every vendor highlights the benefits of "advanced AI" in their products. OT security vendors do this. DCS, SCADA and PLC vendors do this. It's rare to see a product that doesn't pitch their AI as a reason to buy.

In this session, Clint Bodungen will give you an approach to get answers to those questions before you commit to a product or vendor.
